title: Core Computing Competence
description: Apply fundamental knowledge of programming, data structures, algorithms, operating systems, and computer networks to design and develop efficient software systems.

title: Software Engineering & Development
description: Design, develop, test, and maintain software applications using industry-standard methodologies, tools, and best practices across the software development life cycle.

title: Emerging Technology Adaptability
description: Apply knowledge of cloud computing, cybersecurity, and modern frameworks to develop scalable, secure, and innovative technology solutions for real-world problems.

title: Intelligent Systems Design
description: Design and develop intelligent systems leveraging AI, ML, data science, and IoT technologies to solve complex, data-driven problems in diverse domains.

title: Specialization Depth
description: Demonstrate deep expertise in chosen specialization (AIML, Data Science, Cyber Security, IoT, or IT) by applying domain-specific tools, techniques, and frameworks.

title: Innovation & Entrepreneurship
description: Identify emerging technology trends and apply entrepreneurial thinking to design innovative products and solutions that create societal and economic value.

title: Electronics & Circuit Design
description: Analyze, design, and implement analog and digital electronic circuits and systems using standard EDA tools and hardware description languages.

title: Signal Processing & Communication Systems
description: Apply signal processing techniques and communication system design principles to develop efficient wireless and wired communication solutions.

title: Embedded & VLSI Systems
description: Design and develop embedded systems and VLSI circuits for applications in consumer electronics, industrial automation, and smart devices.

title: Electrical Machines & Power Systems
description: Analyze and design electrical machines, power systems, and power electronics circuits for efficient energy generation, transmission, and utilization.

title: Control & Automation
description: Apply control theory and industrial automation techniques to design smart, energy-efficient systems for industrial and renewable energy applications.

title: Design & Manufacturing
description: Apply principles of engineering design, CAD/CAM tools, and manufacturing processes to develop mechanical components and systems meeting functional and quality requirements.

title: Thermal & Fluid Systems
description: Analyze and design thermal and fluid systems including IC engines, turbomachinery, HVAC, and heat exchangers using simulation and experimental methods.

title: Industrial & Automation Engineering
description: Apply lean manufacturing, robotics, and automation principles to optimize production processes and develop smart manufacturing solutions.

title: Structural Analysis & Design
description: Analyze and design structural systems for buildings, bridges, and infrastructure using standard codes, software tools, and material science principles.

title: Environmental & Geotechnical Engineering
description: Apply geotechnical investigation techniques and environmental engineering concepts to address foundation design, soil stability, water resource management, and sustainable infrastructure development.
